mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repository WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(token_used), 0) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, SUM(token_used) as tokens FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at > DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT r.id, r.repository_id as repositoryId, r.status, r.ai_model as aiModel, r.token_used as tokenUsed, r.created_at as createdAt, r.error_msg as errorMsg, repo.name as repoName FROM review r LEFT JOIN repository repo ON r.repository_id = repo.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 5
